categories.name: Message Formatting
categories.description: HubSpot data formatting for Slack Block Kit

categories.name: Rate Limit & Queuing
categories.description: Slack per-method rate limit vs HubSpot webhook bursts

categories.name: Channel Routing
categories.description: Mapping HubSpot pipeline stages to Slack channels

mappings.notes: Unescaped * or _ in deal names breaks Block Kit rendering. Message appears malformed.
mappings.fixStrategy: Escape HubSpot text: replace *, _, ~ with HTML entities or escape sequences before Block Kit insertion.

mappings.toolAValue: HubSpot webhook: up to 100 events in seconds
mappings.toolBValue: Slack: 1 req/sec per method per workspace
mappings.notes: Pipeline bulk update triggers 50 webhooks, each trying to post to Slack. All but first get 429.
mappings.fixStrategy: Queue in middleware. Send at 1/sec. Or aggregate into one summary message.

mappings.notes: Stage 'closedwon' → #closed-wins. Stage 'urgent-escalation' → #support-urgent. Mapping is custom per team.
mappings.fixStrategy: Create mapping table: stageSlug → channelId in middleware config.

errors.errorName: Slack Rate Limit Flood from Webhook Batch
errors.description: Bulk webhook triggers exceed 1/sec Slack rate limit. Messages lost.
errors.fixSummary: Queue messages, send at 1/sec, or aggregate into summaries.

errors.description: Unescaped HubSpot text breaks Slack markdown formatting.
errors.fixSummary: Escape text fields before Block Kit insertion.
